description_long: This object is a modern, floor-mounted toilet with a rounded bowl and an upright, oval-shaped lid. The seat is present and appears to be made of a smooth, hard material, likely plastic or ceramic, and is fitted securely atop the bowl. The base is wide and stable, tapering slightly as it meets the floor, which is typical for toilets designed for urban public or private restrooms. The interior of the bowl is deep and concave, designed to contain water and waste, while the exterior is streamlined with minimal detailing. No flush mechanism or cistern is visible, suggesting a tankless or concealed design. The color scheme is predominantly white with some gray shading, and there are no visible accessibility features such as grab bars or raised seats.
description: A modern, floor-mounted toilet with a rounded bowl, upright lid, and smooth white finish. No flush mechanism or cistern is visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open bowl, seat, and upright lid, with the base visible below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bowl, the upright lid, and the solid base.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the oval lid and the circular opening of the bowl.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the profile of the seat and lid.
